home.title: Job Applications Made
home.subtitle: Upload your CV, add job offers, and track your applications. Perfect for cleaning, factory, logistics, and hospitality workers.
home.uploadDescription: Upload your CV, diplomas, and references. We extract and organize everything automatically.
home.addJobsDescription: Paste a job URL and we'll analyze the requirements to match with your skills.
home.trackDescription: Keep track of all your applications in one place. Export reports for unemployment offices (RAV).
home.languageDescription: Use the platform in your language, then create documents in the hiring company's language.
home.ravDescription: Automatically generate job search reports (Nachweis der persönlichen Arbeitsbemühungen) for Swiss unemployment offices in the required format.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your free account and start managing your job applications today.
home.footer: Helping workers find their next opportunity.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your job applications
auth.privacyPolicyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to register
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.acceptPrivacySuffix: and consent to the collection of my IP address for security purposes

dashboard.selectFile: Select File (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT - Max 25MB)
dashboard.noDocuments: No documents uploaded yet. Upload your CV to get started!
dashboard.noApplications: No applications yet. Add a job offer to get started!
dashboard.noCredits: You do not have enough credits. Please ask an admin to top up your account.
dashboard.opportunityContext: How did you hear about this opportunity?
dashboard.spontaneousSubtitle: Apply proactively without a job posting
dashboard.contextHint: What makes you relevant? Mention business unit, pain points you solve, or projects to pitch.
dashboard.contextPlaceholder: I can help the data platform team modernise analytics pipelines and lead stakeholder workshops.
dashboard.deleteApplicationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the application "{title}"? All generated documents for it will also be removed.
dashboard.confirmDeleteApplicationLead: You are about to permanently delete the application "{title}".
dashboard.confirmDeleteApplicationConsequence: All documents generated for it will also be removed. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.confirmDeleteDocumentLead: You are about to permanently delete the document "{name}".
dashboard.analyzeSuccess: Job offer analysed and recorded as an application.
dashboard.spontaneousFailed: Could not save the spontaneous application.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred languages for communication and documentation.
settings.preferredLanguageHint: Your preferred language for the user interface
settings.motherTongueHint: Your native language for company profile generation
settings.documentationLanguageHint: Default language for generated documents and applications
